entries.allowedUse: Historical evidence or explicit research-only owner review.
entries.blockedUse: Default coding workflow, public capability claim, or automatic model debate.
entries.action: Keep out of default chain; reduce any needed disagreement to Pro admission evidence.

entries.allowedUse: Explicit AgentTool worker/fanout with owner scope and evidence packet.
entries.blockedUse: Autonomous branch tree, hidden second query loop, or parent PASS without evidence.
entries.action: Fold accepted use into Agent Evidence Handoff; freeze branch fantasy paths.

entries.allowedUse: Existing compatibility code only when explicitly enabled and permission-visible.
entries.blockedUse: Default coding runtime, manager mesh, agent-of-agents, or public swarm claim.
entries.action: Keep default route to serial worker or disjoint fanout evidence.

entries.allowedUse: Historical tests and owner-review migration evidence.
entries.blockedUse: New tool caller or second tool runtime.
entries.action: All new outputs must normalize to ToolCallResult at Tool Gate.

entries.allowedUse: Compatibility tests proving mainline export points at the accepted decision table.
entries.blockedUse: Parallel recovery stacks with conflicting retry/replan decisions.
entries.action: P5 owns consolidation into one Recovery Decision Table.

entries.allowedUse: Source evidence for prompt slimming and cache-safe discipline.
entries.blockedUse: Layered prompt accumulation in default query path.
entries.action: P2 owns stable prefix / dynamic tail; prompt policy belongs in runtime gates.

entries.allowedUse: Registry-governed tool boundary through DSXU Tool Gate.
entries.blockedUse: External server or skill owning runtime, permission, or provider routing.
entries.action: P6 keeps MCP/Skill as registry/tool boundary with owner proof.

entries.allowedUse: Dry-run or explicit long-session operator action.
entries.blockedUse: Startup background DeepSeek calls or hidden cost generation.
entries.action: Keep dry-run default until P2 has performance evidence.

entries.allowedUse: Internal regression and dashboard input with smoke label.
entries.blockedUse: Formal SWE-bench or external victory claim without raw paired evidence.
entries.action: P8 final claim gate controls public wording.

entries.allowedUse: Owner-reviewed mainline alias, release-only command, or internal evidence command.
entries.blockedUse: New product surface without owner classification.
entries.action: P0 command catalog must classify every script and block claim leakage.

rule: Frozen capabilities may only appear through explicit owner review, compatibility evidence, or release-gated proof. They must not become default coding workflow, GitHub public claims, or hidden second runtimes.
